product_overview: Exam Portal is a web application for students to take online exams and for administrators to manage and monitor those exams. It includes role-based login, a student exam-taking experience, and an admin dashboard with proctoring-focused exam workflows. IMPORTANT TEST CREDENTIALS: Use Student ID 'N24H01A0317' with password 'student123' for student login. Use Admin Username 'admin' with password 'admin123' for admin login.
core_goals: Let students sign in and access their exam dashboard
Let students start and complete an online exam session
Let administrators sign in and view exam-related dashboard information
Let the exam experience collect camera and screen-sharing permissions for proctoring
Let students answer questions, navigate through an exam, and submit their work

features.name: Authentication
features.description: Students and administrators sign in through a role-based authentication flow.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in email and password for student/admin -> Submit login form -> See the appropriate dashboard

features.name: Student Dashboard
features.description: Students review available exams from their dashboard and begin an exam session.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in email and password for student/admin -> Submit login form -> See the student dashboard -> View list of exams -> Start exam

features.name: Admin Dashboard
features.description: Administrators access a dashboard to review summary information and statistics.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in email and password for student/admin -> Submit login form -> See the admin dashboard -> View stats

features.name: Exam Interface
features.description: Students take an exam with webcam and screen-sharing permissions, question navigation, and final submission.
user_flows: Navigate to / -> Fill in email and password for student/admin -> Submit login form -> See the student dashboard -> View list of exams -> Start exam -> Allow camera and screen share -> Answer multiple choice questions -> Move to the next question -> Move to the previous question -> Mark a question for review -> Submit exam

Navigate to / -> Fill in email and password for student/admin -> Submit login form -> See the student dashboard -> View list of exams -> Start exam -> Allow camera and screen share -> Answer multiple choice questions -> Open the question grid -> Jump to a specific question -> Submit exam

routes.description: Main entry component managing application state
